skill.core.scholar.description.advanced:
{Advanced Scholar}

Allows heroes to teach each other any spell up to 3rd level and increases knowledge by 2
skill.core.scholar.description.basic:
{Basic Scholar}

Allows heroes to teach each other any spell up to 2nd level and increases knowledge by 1
skill.core.scholar.description.expert:
{Expert Scholar}

Allows heroes to teach each other any spell up to 5th level and increases knowledge by 3
